/**
 * SettingsScreen.jsx — Pantalla de configuración
 * ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 * Enruta hacia las diferentes secciones de ajustes según activePage.
 * No tiene navegación propia; usa el activePage de HomeScreen.
 *
 * Secciones disponibles:
 *   "settings-profile" → ProfileSection  (avatar, nombre de usuario)
 *   "settings-wallet"  → WalletSection   (saldo de monedas e historial)
 *   "settings-notifs"  → NotificationsSection (toggles e inbox)
 *   "settings-logout"  → LogoutSection   (botón de cierre de sesión)
 *
 * Props recibidos de HomeScreen:
 *   activePage, user, setUser, coins, notifs, setNotifs, onLogout
 *
 * Estilos: SettingsScreen.css (importado en este archivo)
 */import"../styles/SettingsScreen.css";import ProfileSection from"../components/settings/ProfileSection";import WalletSection from"../components/settings/WalletSection";import NotificationsSection from"../components/settings/NotificationsSection";import LogoutSection from"../components/settings/LogoutSection";import GpsSection from"../components/settings/GpsSection";import AboutSection from"../components/settings/AboutSection";import TosSection from"../components/settings/TosSection";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const SECTION_TITLES={"settings-profile":"👤 PERFIL","settings-wallet":"🪙 MONEDERO","settings-notifs":"🔔 NOTIFICACIONES","settings-logout":"🚪 SESIÓN","settings-gps":"📡 GPS","settings-about":"❓ QUÉ ES RPG LOG","settings-tos":"📜 TÉRMINOS Y CONDICIONES"};export default function SettingsScreen(_ref){let{section,user,setUser,notifs,setNotifs,onLogout,gpsEnabled,gpsStatus,lastCoords,onToggleGps,isSuperUser,onToggleSuperUser}=_ref;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"settings-page",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"settings-breadcrumb",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:"CONFIG"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:"\u203A"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"settings-breadcrumb-active",children:SECTION_TITLES[section]})]}),section==="settings-profile"&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ProfileSection,{user:user,setUser:setUser,isSuperUser:isSuperUser,onToggleSuperUser:onToggleSuperUser}),section==="settings-wallet"&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(WalletSection,{user:user}),section==="settings-notifs"&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(NotificationsSection,{notifs:notifs,setNotifs:setNotifs}),section==="settings-logout"&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(LogoutSection,{onLogout:onLogout}),section==="settings-about"&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AboutSection,{}),section==="settings-tos"&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TosSection,{}),section==="settings-gps"&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(GpsSection,{gpsEnabled:gpsEnabled,gpsStatus:gpsStatus,lastCoords:lastCoords,onToggleGps:onToggleGps})]});}
